response.justification: Nearly two decades of fullstack experience with strong alignment to the core stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes — plus current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work, which is an explicitly required and rare skill. Demonstrated craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and high-scale systems experience fit the role well; the main gaps are no stated Nest.js or Kotlin experience and a notable portion of career depth in DLang rather than the primary stack.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple recent roles
Current AI-agent development and MCP tooling experience, directly matching a required skill
Strong testing culture: TDD practitioner, author of testing libraries, testing workshops
concerns: Kotlin absent; Java exposure appears dated and secondary
Significant career investment in DLang, a niche language outside the role's stack
